description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte gray and blue color scheme. It has a collapsible stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine with visible colored markings. The handguard is ventilated with multiple slots for heat dissipation and accessory mounting, and the barrel is capped with a cylindrical muzzle device. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, both at the front and rear, providing basic aiming capability. The overall build suggests a lightweight, modular firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ventilated handguard, detachable magazine, and iron sights, finished in gray and blue.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, ventilated handguard, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and handguard slots.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle device, barrel, and the front iron sight.
